title: TSMC struggles to keep up with AI demand: ‘We can only support so much’
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. - the world's biggest semiconductor-maker - is struggling to meet demands from American customers even with its factory buildout in the US, according to reports from Reuters and Bloomberg. "Customer demand is so high, and we can only support so much," TSMC CEO C.C. Wei said after a shareholder meeting on […]
title_es: TSMC advierte sobre presión en demanda de chips IA
bajada: El fabricante de semiconductores TSMC admite que no puede satisfacer completamente la demanda de clientes estadounidenses de chips IA. Refleja la brecha entre capacidad productiva actual y necesidades de la industria de IA.
bajada_en: Taiwan's TSMC admits it cannot fully meet US customer demand for AI chips. Reflects the gap between current production capacity and AI industry needs.

title: AI leaders call for tougher protections against AI-aided bioweapons
summary: Some of the AI industry's biggest rivals have put their many, many grievances aside for a common cause: making it harder for people to use their technology to develop biological weapons. In an open letter to US lawmakers, tech leaders are pressing Congress to enact rules closing what they say is an alarming biosecurity gap […]
title_es: Líderes de IA piden protecciones contra armas biológicas
bajada: Ejecutivos de OpenAI, Anthropic y otros líderes tecnológicos firman una carta abierta al Congreso de EE.UU. pidiendo regulaciones para prevenir el uso de IA en desarrollo de armas biológicas. Destaca preocupaciones compartidas sobre bioseguridad.
bajada_en: OpenAI, Anthropic, and other tech leaders sign open letter to US Congress calling for regulations to prevent AI use in biological weapons development. Highlights shared biosecurity concerns.

title: github /copilot-sdk
summary:
GitHub Copilot CLI SDKs Agents for every app. Embed Copilot's agentic workflows in your application with the GitHub Copilot SDK for Python, TypeScript, Go, .NET, Java, and Rust. The GitHub Copilot SDK exposes the same engine behind Copilot CLI: a production-tested agent runtime you can invoke programmatically. No need to build your own orchestration—you define agent behavior, Copilot handles planning, tool invocation, file edits, and more. Available SDKs SDK Location Cookbook Installation Node.js / TypeScript nodejs/ Cookbook npm install @github/copilot-sdk Python python/ Cookbook pip install github-copilot-sdk Go go/ Cookbook go get github.com/github/copilot-sdk/go .NET dotnet/ Cookbook dotnet add package GitHub.Copilot.SDK Rust rust/ — cargo add github-copilot-sdk Java java/ Cookbook Maven coordinates com.github:copilot-sdk-java See instructions for Maven and Gradle See the individual SDK READMEs for installation, usage examples, and API reference. Getting Started For a complete walkthrough, see the Getting Started Guide . Quick steps: (Optional) Install the Copilot CLI For Node.js, Python, and .NET SDKs, the Copilot CLI is bundled automatically and no separate installation is required.
For Go, Java, and Rust, install the CLI manually or ensure copilot is available in your PATH. Go and Rust also expose application-level CLI bundling features. Install your preferred SDK using the commands above. See the SDK README for usage examples and API documentation. Architecture All SDKs communicate with the Copilot CLI server via JSON-RPC: Your Application
       ↓
  SDK Client
       ↓ JSON-RPC
  Copilot CLI (server mode) The SDK manages the CLI process lifecycle automatically. You can also connect to an external CLI server—see the Getting Started Guide for details on running the CLI in server mode. FAQ Do I need a GitHub Copilot subscription to use the SDK? Yes, a GitHub Copilot subscription is required to use the GitHub Copilot SDK, unless you are using BYOK (Bring Your O
title_es: GitHub lanza Copilot SDK para construir agentes personalizados
bajada: GitHub publica Copilot SDK disponible en Python, TypeScript, Go, .NET, Java y Rust para integrar flujos de trabajo de agentes en aplicaciones. Democratiza el acceso a orquestación de agentes sin necesidad de construir infraestructura propia.
bajada_en: GitHub releases Copilot SDK in Python, TypeScript, Go, .NET, Java, and Rust to embed agent workflows in applications. Democratizes access to agent orchestration without building custom infrastructure.

title: Introducing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind
summary: GPT-Rosalind advances life sciences research with enhanced biological reasoning, medicinal chemistry expertise, genomics analysis, and experimental workflow capabilities.
title_es: GPT-Rosalind mejora análisis en ciencias de la vida
bajada: OpenAI presenta nuevas capacidades para GPT-Rosalind, incluyendo razonamiento biológico mejorado, análisis de genómica y flujos de trabajo experimentales. Es un avance significativo para investigadores en biología molecular y química medicinal.
bajada_en: OpenAI introduces enhanced capabilities for GPT-Rosalind with improved biological reasoning, genomics analysis, and experimental workflows. A significant advance for molecular biology and medicinal chemistry researchers.

title: How Wasmer used Codex to build a Node.js runtime for the edge
summary: See how Wasmer used Codex with GPT-5.5 to build a Node.js runtime for the edge, accelerating development 10x to 20x and shipping in weeks instead of months.
title_es: Wasmer acelera 10x desarrollo de runtime Node.js con Codex
bajada: Wasmer utilizó Codex con GPT-5.5 para construir un runtime de Node.js optimizado para edge computing, reduciendo el tiempo de desarrollo de meses a semanas. Demuestra el potencial de las herramientas de IA para acelerar infraestructura compleja.
bajada_en: Wasmer used Codex with GPT-5.5 to build an edge-optimized Node.js runtime, cutting development time from months to weeks. Demonstrates the potential of AI tools for accelerating complex infrastructure development.

title: EVA-Bench Data 2.0: 3 Domains, 121 Tools, 213 Scenarios
bajada: ServiceNow e Hugging Face lanzan EVA-Bench Data 2.0 con 213 escenarios y 121 herramientas distribuidas en 3 dominios. Expande los recursos para evaluar capacidades de agentes de IA en contextos variados.
bajada_en: ServiceNow and Hugging Face launch EVA-Bench Data 2.0 with 213 scenarios and 121 tools across 3 domains. Expands resources for evaluating AI agent capabilities across diverse contexts.

title: NVIDIA Research Unlocks Advanced Grasping, Smarter Autonomous Driving and Agent Training at Scale
summary: What makes a robot gripper useful isn’t that it can pick up one object — it’s that it can pick up the next one, and the one after that, with a tool it’s never held before.  What makes an autonomous vehicle system safe isn’t just that it can reason through a situation — it’s that […]
title_es: NVIDIA avanza en robots y conducción autónoma con agentes
bajada: NVIDIA presenta investigación sobre grasping avanzado, conducción autónoma y entrenamiento de agentes a escala. Demuestra progreso en IA física para robots que pueden generalizar a nuevas herramientas y tareas.
bajada_en: NVIDIA presents research on advanced grasping, autonomous driving, and agent training at scale. Demonstrates progress in physical AI for robots that can generalize to new tools and tasks.

title: NVIDIA Enables the Next Era Of Physical AI Research With Agent Skills For Autonomous Vehicles, Robotics And Vision AI
summary: At CVPR, NVIDIA is unveiling new physical AI agent skills that help researchers and developers speed the development of autonomous vehicles, robots and vision AI systems. The core challenge in physical AI research isn’t simply developing stronger models. It’s building a full workflow around them — reconstructing real-world scenes, generating edge-case scenarios, training policies, evaluating […]
title_es: NVIDIA desbloquea habilidades de agentes para IA física
bajada: NVIDIA lanza nuevas habilidades de agentes físicos para vehículos autónomos, robótica y sistemas de visión. Aborda el desafío de construir flujos de trabajo completos alrededor de modelos de IA física.
bajada_en: NVIDIA releases new physical AI agent skills for autonomous vehicles, robotics, and vision systems. Addresses the challenge of building complete workflows around physical AI models.

title: Lovable signs multiyear deal with Google Cloud to up usage 5x, source says
summary: Lovable and Google signed an expanded multiyear deal that involves a 5x expansion of Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud, and expanded access to Anthropic Claude.
title_es: Lovable expande presencia en Google Cloud 5x
bajada: Lovable y Google Cloud firmaron un acuerdo multianual que amplía la footprint de Lovable 5 veces y expande el acceso a Claude de Anthropic. Consolida alianzas entre plataformas de desarrollo y proveedores cloud.
bajada_en: Lovable and Google Cloud signed a multiyear deal expanding Lovable's footprint 5x with expanded access to Anthropic's Claude. Solidifies partnerships between development platforms and cloud providers.

title: Amazon develops a warehouse robot that workers can speak to
summary: Amazon has announced a new version of its fully autonomous warehouse robot, Proteus, that will interact using language instead of code. The expanded capabilities come as part of a growing pivot toward automation as the e-commerce giant replaces its human workers with robots. Amazon says the AI-powered upgrade means its human employees can assign the […]
title_es: Amazon presenta robot Proteus que responde a lenguaje natural
bajada: Amazon anuncia una versión mejorada de su robot autónomo Proteus que interactúa mediante lenguaje natural en lugar de código. Acelera la automatización en almacenes reduciendo la barrera de interacción con máquinas.
bajada_en: Amazon announces an upgraded autonomous warehouse robot Proteus that uses natural language instead of code for interaction. Accelerates warehouse automation by lowering the barrier for human-machine interaction.

title: Jeff Bezos Is Funding a Wild Hunt for the Brain’s ‘Core Algorithm’
summary: With $500 million in funding and a reported $2.5 billion valuation, Flourish wants to reinvent AI by putting real neurons under the microscope.
title_es: Bezos financia búsqueda del 'algoritmo central' del cerebro
bajada: Flourish recibe $500 millones en financiamiento de Bezos para investigar el algoritmo fundamental del cerebro usando neuronas reales. Un esfuerzo ambicioso para reinventar IA basándose en principios neurocientíficos.
bajada_en: Flourish receives $500 million in funding from Bezos to research the brain's fundamental algorithm using real neurons. An ambitious effort to reinvent AI based on neuroscience principles.

title: OpenAI and Anthropic Sign Letter to Prevent AI-Developed Biological Weapons
summary: Leading AI labs, executives, and scientists are sending a letter to lawmakers urging them to improve tracking of synthetic DNA sequences that could be used for bioweapons.
title_es: OpenAI y Anthropic firman carta sobre armas biológicas
bajada: OpenAI, Anthropic y otros laboratorios de IA firman carta a legisladores solicitando mejoras en el seguimiento de secuencias de ADN sintético para prevenir bioarmas. Complementa esfuerzos regulatorios sobre bioseguridad.
bajada_en: OpenAI, Anthropic, and other AI labs sign letter to lawmakers requesting improved tracking of synthetic DNA sequences to prevent bioweapons. Supports regulatory efforts on biosecurity.

title: How Endava is redesigning software delivery around AI agents
summary: Learn how Endava is using AI agents, ChatGPT Enterprise, and Codex to accelerate software delivery, automate workflows, and build an AI-native culture across the enterprise.
title_es: Endava rediseña entregas de software con agentes de IA
bajada: Endava utiliza agentes de IA y ChatGPT Enterprise para acelerar el desarrollo de software y automatizar flujos de trabajo. El caso muestra cómo las empresas están adoptando una cultura nativa en IA para mejorar la productividad.
bajada_en: Endava uses AI agents and ChatGPT Enterprise to accelerate software delivery and automate workflows. The case demonstrates how enterprises are adopting AI-native cultures to improve productivity.

title: How to Fine-Tune Nemotron 3.5 ASR for Your Language, Domain, or Accent
title_es: Fine-tuning de Nemotron 3.5 ASR para idiomas y acentos
bajada: NVIDIA y Hugging Face publican guía para ajustar Nemotron 3.5 ASR a lenguajes, dominios y acentos específicos. Facilita la adaptación de modelos de reconocimiento de voz a casos de uso particulares.
bajada_en: NVIDIA and Hugging Face publish guide for fine-tuning Nemotron 3.5 ASR to specific languages, domains, and accents. Enables adaptation of speech recognition models for particular use cases.

title: Designing the hf CLI as an agent-optimized way to work with the Hub
title_es: Hugging Face rediseña CLI optimizado para agentes
bajada: Hugging Face lanza una CLI diseñada específicamente para que agentes de IA trabajen con el Hub de forma eficiente. Mejora la integración entre herramientas y flujos de trabajo basados en agentes.
bajada_en: Hugging Face launches a CLI specifically designed for AI agents to work with the Hub efficiently. Improves integration between tools and agent-based workflows.
